vulnerabilities.rule_name: 令牌额外信息中包含完整用户对象敏感信息泄露
vulnerabilities.description: 敏感数据泄露：应用程序在响应、日志或令牌中暴露了不应公开的敏感信息（如用户密码、身份证号、银行卡号等），违反数据保护合规要求。

vulnerabilities.rule_id: 刷新令牌重用配置风险
vulnerabilities.rule_name: 刷新令牌重用配置风险
vulnerabilities.description: 令牌安全配置问题：令牌的生成、验证或存储存在安全缺陷，可能被伪造、窃取或重放，导致会话劫持或身份冒充。
vulnerabilities.explanation:
{"title": "刷新令牌重用配置风险", "vuln_type": "security_vuln", "severity": "MEDIUM", "severity_reason": "reuseRefreshTokens(true)允许刷新令牌多次使用，攻击者若获取刷新令牌可无限刷新，延长权限持有时间", "location": "C:\1AAA_PROJECT\HOS\HOS-LS\real-project\bizspring-open-main\bizspring-business\bizspring-auth\src\main\java\cn\bizspring\cloud\auth\config\AuthorizationServerConfig.java:50", "confidence": 0.5, "evidence": [{"type": "code_line", "location": "C:\1AAA_PROJECT\HOS\HOS-LS\real-project\bizspring-open-main\bizspring-business\bizspring-auth\src\main\java\cn\bizspring\cloud\auth\config\AuthorizationServerConfig.java:50", "reason": "显式设置reuseRefreshTokens(true)导致刷新令牌可重复使用", "confidence": 0.5, "code_snippet": "endpoints
.allowedTokenEndpointRequestMethods(HttpMethod.GET, HttpMethod.POST)
.tokenStore(tokenStore())
.tokenEnhancer(tokenEnhancer())
.userDetailsService(bizUserDetailsService)
.authenticationManager(authenticationManagerBean)
.reuseRefreshTokens(true)
.pathMapping("/oauth/confirm_access", "/token/confirm_access")
.exceptionTranslator(new BaseWebResponseExceptionTranslator());"}], "cwe_id": "CWE-613", "cvss": "4.0", "signal_id": "RISK-2", "signal_state": "CONFIRMED", "verification_decision": "CONFIRMED", "verification_reason": "代码行号50在文件范围内，实际代码与描述一致，数据流通过", "vulnerability": "刷新令牌重用配置风险", "line_match_status": "EXACT"}

evidence.reason: 显式设置reuseRefreshTokens(true)导致刷新令牌可重复使用

metadata.rule_id: 刷新令牌重用配置风险

vulnerabilities.description: 代码中调用.csrf().disable()，完全禁用CSRF保护，导致跨站请求伪造攻击风险
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: 移除.csrf().disable()调用或替换为更细粒度的CSRF配置，或确保所有状态变更请求使用CSRF令牌
vulnerabilities.explanation: {"vulnerability": "CSRF保护显式禁用", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-business\\bizspring-auth\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\auth\\config\\WebSecurityConfigurer.java:25", "severity": "MEDIUM", "status": "CONFIRMED", "confidence": 0.5, "cvss": "5.3", "description": "代码中调用.csrf().disable()，完全禁用CSRF保护，导致跨站请求伪造攻击风险", "recommendation": "移除.csrf().disable()调用或替换为更细粒度的CSRF配置，或确保所有状态变更请求使用CSRF令牌", "evidence": [{"type": "code_line", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-business\\bizspring-auth\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\auth\\config\\WebSecurityConfigurer.java:25", "reason": "显式禁用CSRF保护，位于configure方法中", "confidence": 0.9, "source_agent": "Agent-3"}], "evidence_chain_summary": "代码行25明确存在.csrf().disable()，无输入数据流影响，直接生效", "requires_human_review": false, "signal_state": "CONFIRMED", "linked_signals": ["RISK-1"], "ai_reported_line": 25, "verified_line": 25, "line_match_status": "FUZZY", "code_snippet": ""}

evidence.reason: 显式禁用CSRF保护，位于configure方法中

vulnerabilities.description: Spring Actuator端点（/actuator/**）被放行且无需认证，可能导致系统信息泄露、配置修改等高风险操作
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: 移除/actuator/**的permitAll配置，或启用认证并限制敏感端点访问
vulnerabilities.explanation: {"vulnerability": "敏感端点Actuator未认证放行", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-business\\bizspring-auth\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\auth\\config\\WebSecurityConfigurer.java:21", "severity": "HIGH", "status": "CONFIRMED", "confidence": 0.5, "cvss": "8.6", "description": "Spring Actuator端点（/actuator/**）被放行且无需认证，可能导致系统信息泄露、配置修改等高风险操作", "recommendation": "移除/actuator/**的permitAll配置，或启用认证并限制敏感端点访问", "evidence": [{"type": "code_line", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-business\\bizspring-auth\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\auth\\config\\WebSecurityConfigurer.java:21", "reason": "/actuator/**被列入permitAll列表，绕过认证", "confidence": 0.9, "source_agent": "Agent-3"}], "evidence_chain_summary": "代码行21将/actuator/**配置为permitAll，无需认证即可访问，直接生效", "requires_human_review": false, "signal_state": "CONFIRMED", "linked_signals": ["RISK-2"], "ai_reported_line": 21, "verified_line": 21, "line_match_status": "FUZZY", "code_snippet": ""}

vulnerabilities.description: 硬编码路径风险：代码中包含硬编码的文件路径或资源路径，可能导致在不同环境或部署配置下出现路径错误，降低系统的可移植性和配置灵活性。

vulnerabilities.description: 跨站请求伪造(CSRF)漏洞：攻击者诱骗已登录用户在不知情的情况下发起恶意请求，可导致账户设置被修改、密码被更改等敏感操作被执行。
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: 尽快修复：为所有状态修改请求添加CSRF Token验证，使用SameSite Cookie
vulnerabilities.explanation: {"vulnerability": "CSRF保护显式禁用", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-business\\bizspring-upms\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\upms\\admin\\controller\\OauthClientController.java", "severity": "MEDIUM", "status": "CONFIRMED", "confidence": 0.5, "cvss_score": "", "recommendation": "尽快修复：为所有状态修改请求添加CSRF Token验证，使用SameSite Cookie", "evidence": [], "requires_human_review": true, "signal_state": "CONFIRMED", "verification_decision": "CONFIRMED", "metadata": {"line_match_status": "VERIFIED"}}

vulnerabilities.rule_id: 配置文件硬编码数据库密码
vulnerabilities.rule_name: 配置文件硬编码数据库密码
vulnerabilities.description: 硬编码凭据风险：代码中包含硬编码的敏感凭据（如密码、API密钥、加密密钥），可能被源码泄露或通过代码审查被发现，造成严重安全风险。建议使用环境变量或密钥管理系统存储敏感信息。
vulnerabilities.code_snippet:
use-ping-method: false
      username: admin
      password: 4STYzRUjNutVAyr
      url: jdbc:mysql://bizspring-mysql:3306/bizspring_open_upms?characterEncoding=utf8&zeroDateTimeBehavior=convertToNull&useSSL=false&useJDBCCompliantTimezoneShift=true&useLegacyDatetimeCode=false&serverTimezone=GMT%2B8&allowMultiQueries=true&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
  freemarker:
    allow-request-override: false
    allow-session-override: false

vulnerabilities.rule_id: isValidCredentials方法中空指针异常风险
vulnerabilities.rule_name: isValidCredentials方法中空指针异常风险
vulnerabilities.description: 硬编码凭据风险：代码中包含硬编码的敏感凭据（如密码、API密钥、加密密钥），可能被源码泄露或通过代码审查被发现，造成严重安全风险。建议使用环境变量或密钥管理系统存储敏感信息。
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: 尽快修复：使用安全的方式存储凭据，实施强密码策略和密钥轮换
vulnerabilities.explanation: {"vulnerability": "isValidCredentials方法中空指针异常风险", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-base\\bizspring-base-upms\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\upms\\common\\entity\\Admin.java:65", "severity": "MEDIUM", "status": "REFINED", "confidence": 0.714, "cvss_score": "", "recommendation": "尽快修复：使用安全的方式存储凭据，实施强密码策略和密钥轮换", "evidence": [{"type": "code_line", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-base\\bizspring-base-upms\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\upms\\common\\entity\\Admin.java:65", "reason": "在credentials可能为null的情况下，先执行String.valueOf(credentials)而未判空，触发NullPointerException。", "confidence": 0.9, "code_snippet": "String rawPassword = credentials instanceof char[] ? String.valueOf((char[]) credentials) : String.valueOf(credentials);"}, {"type": "code_line", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-base\\bizspring-base-upms\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\upms\\common\\entity\\Admin.java:67", "reason": "判空操作在转换之后，无法阻止异常。", "confidence": 0.9, "code_snippet": "return credentials != null && ENCODER.matches(rawPassword, encodedPassword);"}], "requires_human_review": true, "signal_state": "REFINED", "verification_decision": "UNCERTAIN", "metadata": {"line_match_status": "VERIFIED"}, "line_match_status": "EXACT"}

evidence.reason: 在credentials可能为null的情况下，先执行String.valueOf(credentials)而未判空，触发NullPointerException。
evidence.code_snippet: String rawPassword = credentials instanceof char[] ? String.valueOf((char[]) credentials) : String.valueOf(credentials);

evidence.reason: 判空操作在转换之后，无法阻止异常。

metadata.rule_id: isValidCredentials方法中空指针异常风险

vulnerabilities.description: CSRF保护机制中Cookie的HttpOnly属性设置为false，增加了通过XSS窃取令牌的风险
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: 移除withHttpOnlyFalse()调用，使用默认的HttpOnly=true配置，或显式设置为true。
vulnerabilities.explanation: {"vulnerability": "CSRF令牌Cookie HttpOnly属性设置为false", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-base\\bizspring-base-security\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\common\\security\\component\\BaseResourceServerConfigurerAdapter.java:36", "severity": "MEDIUM", "status": "CONFIRMED", "confidence": "MEDIUM", "cvss": "6.1", "description": "CSRF保护机制中Cookie的HttpOnly属性设置为false，增加了通过XSS窃取令牌的风险", "recommendation": "移除withHttpOnlyFalse()调用，使用默认的HttpOnly=true配置，或显式设置为true。", "evidence": [{"type": "code_line", "location": "C:\\1AAA_PROJECT\\HOS\\HOS-LS\\real-project\\bizspring-open-main\\bizspring-base\\bizspring-base-security\\src\\main\\java\\cn\\bizspring\\cloud\\common\\security\\component\\BaseResourceServerConfigurerAdapter.java:36", "reason": "使用withHttpOnlyFalse()显式将CSRF令牌Cookie的HttpOnly属性设为false，违反安全最佳实践", "confidence": 0.55, "source_agent": "Agent-3"}], "evidence_chain_summary": "代码片段直接显示使用CookieCsrfTokenRepository.withHttpOnlyFalse()，确认HttpOnly被设为false，存在信息泄露风险。", "requires_human_review": false, "signal_state": "CONFIRMED", "linked_signals": ["RISK-1"], "ai_reported_line": 36, "verified_line": 36, "line_match_status": "FUZZY", "code_snippet": ""}

evidence.reason: 使用withHttpOnlyFalse()显式将CSRF令牌Cookie的HttpOnly属性设为false，违反安全最佳实践

vulnerabilities.rule_id: 远程令牌服务调用未显式配置SSL/TLS证书校验
vulnerabilities.rule_name: 远程令牌服务调用未显式配置SSL/TLS证书校验
vulnerabilities.description: 使用RemoteTokenServices时未显式配置SSL/TLS证书验证，可能导致中间人攻击
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: 在RestTemplate中配置SSL/TLS证书校验，例如使用NoopHostnameVerifier或自定义TrustManager。
